display.purpose: Landing hero and large quote amounts only.

headline.purpose: App page titles and section headings.

motion.name: ease-out-standard
motion.purpose: Hero headline stagger and dialog entrance.

motion.name: marquee-duration
motion.purpose: Landing trust strip; replaced with static wrap when prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: transition-opacity
motion.purpose: Primary button hover and CTA feedback.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main conversion action — quote, protect, connect.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 44px; padding: 14px 28px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; background: #298dff; color: #000; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5ca9ff; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Ghost outline actions — How it works, See the flow.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 44px; padding: 14px 28px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 9999px; background: transparent; color: #fff; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5ca9ff; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Panel Card
components.description: Quote sections, connect wallet state, history rows container.
components.html:
Example at BTC $100,000 · trigger −2%

If BTC drops below $98,000 before expiry, you get $1,000.
components.css: .ds-panel { padding: 24px; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #fff; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-panel-label { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 14px; color: #89919f; } .ds-panel-quote { margin: 0; font-family: Geologica, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.25rem, 3.5vw, 1.75rem); line-height: 1.2; font-weight: 500; } .ds-panel-quote strong { color: #5ca9ff; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: BTC Input Field
components.description: Single numeric input for BTC holdings on quote screen.
components.html: BTC
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.35); } .ds-field-input { flex: 1; min-width: 0; border: 0; outline: none; background: transparent; color: #fff; font-family: Geologica, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-field-input::placeholder { color: #6c7584; } .ds-field-input:focus-visible { outline: none; } .ds-field:focus-within { outline: 2px solid #5ca9ff; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-field-suffix { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #89919f; }

components.name: Status Chip — Active
components.description: Policy ACTIVE or keeper live state.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-chip-active { color: #5ca9ff; border-color: rgba(92,169,255,0.35); background: transparent; }

components.name: Status Chip — Paid
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-chip-paid { color: #7df752; border-color: rgba(125,247,82,0.35); background: transparent; }

components.name: App Tab Nav
components.html: <nav class="ds-tabs" aria-label="App menu"><button type="button" class="ds-tab ds-tab-active" aria-current="page">Cover</button><button type="button" class="ds-tab">History</button><button type="button" class="ds-tab">Wallet</button></nav>
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: flex; gap: 4px; padding: 4px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); } .ds-tab { flex: 1; min-height: 40px; padding: 8px 12px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: #89919f; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-tab:hover { color: #fff; } .ds-tab-active { background: #002e6a; color: #fff; } .ds-tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5ca9ff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: App Header
components.description: Fixed top bar with logo and wallet connect.
components.html: SSentinel
components.css: .ds-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 16px 24px; background: #000; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-header-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; text-decoration: none; color: #fff; } .ds-header-mark { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 8px; background: #298dff; color: #000; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-header-name { font-family: Geologica, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; background: #298dff; color: #000; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-compact { min-height: 44px; padding: 8px 20px; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; }

narrative.overview:
Sentinel looks like a trading terminal after hours: black field, one Sui-blue accent, numbers you can audit. The anxious BTC holder arrives before a macro event — they need one premium, one button, one receipt. Visual noise is the enemy. Insurance language leads; protocol plumbing hides behind expanders.

Surfaces are flat and tonal. Depth comes from radial blue gradients and panel tints, not drop shadows. Geometric Geologica headlines carry institutional weight; Manrope keeps disclosures readable.
keyCharacteristics: Committed dark mode on void black with Sui blue as sole saturated accent
Pill primary actions at 44px minimum touch height
Quote numbers in bright blue; supporting copy in steel
Flat bordered panels — no card shadows

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Sui blue carries conversion and emphasis. Lime and orange appear only for status semantics — never as decorative gradients or section backgrounds.

rules.name: The Steel-on-Black Rule
rules.body: Body text uses steel muted, not lighter gray. If contrast is borderline at text-xs, bump toward white or restrict steel to darker band backgrounds.

rules.name: The Insurance-First Rule
rules.body: Headlines say Protect your Bitcoin and Get a quote. Protocol terms live in details expanders only.

rules.name: The Display Cap Rule
rules.body: Hero clamp max stays at 5.5rem. Letter-spacing floor −0.03em on display headings.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No drop shadows on cards, buttons, or nav. Emphasis via color, size, or border.

rules.name: The Gradient-Depth Rule
rules.body: Hero and app shells may use one or two radial blue ellipses on black. Never full-bleed mesh gradients.

dos: Do lead every screen with insurance language — premium, coverage, trigger, payout, receipt.
Do use sui-blue pill buttons for every primary conversion path with 44px minimum touch targets.
Do hide protocol implementation details in For builders or How is this priced expanders.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion with static fallbacks.
donts: Don't use cream, sand, or warm off-white page backgrounds.
Don't stack numbered section markers or identical three-card grids across multiple sections.
Don't use glassmorphism, gradient text, or side-stripe colored borders on cards.
Don't show dUSDC, strike ladders, or vol-surface jargon above the fold.
Don't promise live data on decorative static visuals.
Don't ship new surfaces in the legacy wireframe style (.wrap, .box, #ccc borders).
